message:
Fix describe() type mismatch for string column statistics

The describe() method was emitting Scalar::Int64 for count, unique,
and freq statistics of string columns, but these values need to be
Scalar::Utf8 strings to match the other rows (top) in the output
column. This caused type mismatches during Column::from_values()
construction. Convert count, unique, and freq to string representation
via .to_string() for consistent column typing.

- crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs: 3 lines changed in describe() —
  count, unique, freq now use Scalar::Utf8(n.to_string()) instead
  of Scalar::Int64(n as i64)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
